_fill: YOU fill this. Your product vision, who it is for, how it makes money, and what is out of scope for v1.

product.vision: One sentence: what world does this product create for its users?
product.problemStatement: What pain does this product solve and for whom? Why do existing solutions fall short?
businessModel: e.g. B2B | B2C | B2B2C | SaaS | PaaS
outOfScopeV1: Feature or capability intentionally excluded from version 1
